query:
SELECT 
  a.direcao,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.descricao) as descricoes_unicas
FROM procedimentos p
JOIN arquivos a ON p.arquivo_id = a.id
WHERE a.estabelecimento_id = 1
GROUP BY a.direcao;

  COUNT(DISTINCT p.descricao) as descricoes_unicas
